overview: Grimsley is a Normal-class Demon monster found in Ice Abyss. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 300 HP, 21 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 150% ratio (315 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 500.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 500, ability check distance 600
strategies.description: Combat area radius 500. Ability check distance 600.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
